data_samples.label: src-tauri/src/main.rs
src-tauri/src/lib.rs
IPC command: get_cli_render_job (lib.rs)

description: Real-time character-grid image renderer for macOS — GUI + CLI + MCP server. p5.js + Tauri 2 + Rust.
